title: Chapter 58
content:
Chapter 58

There was a very simple question on my mind. The way the lady of this town was talking about her husband simply implied that she didn't expect him to come home from his hunt. In other words, there was a trap designed for him to never return.

With the current circumstances, they could easily blame it on a stronger beast who was never there, who had come to the forest and eaten all the monsters, hence the shortage of monsters. That would be the simplest of explanations ever, and people would buy it too, since the lack of beasts was apparent.

It was brilliant and all, but the problem was my level. The lord was the only B rank existence in this backwater town. My level progress was at stake if he were to die in the forest. I needed to be the one to kill him, not whoever was behind Zara.

Well, even if I wanted to, I wouldn't be able to leave before nightfall, so there was no use in fretting about it. I would let nature take its course.

For now...

Knock! Knock!

"Come in." I entered the room only to find Zara along with her children. Her daughter and two sons were also in the room, enjoying their tea and snacks.

"Forgive me, Lady Zara," I quickly recovered from the surprise and immediately apologized, "I was unaware that you were busy with your family. Shall I return sometime else?"

"Have you recovered?" Zara asked, dismissing my apology entirely.

"Yes, I have, Lady Zara." I gently replied.

"Very well. Then we shall not waste any time." Zara said as she stood up from the table and made her way to the bed, putting her hands on the bed in the same position she had done yesterday, and said, "Go on. Get to work."

"I-In front of your children, Lady Zara?" I couldn't help but ask. And no, I didn't stammer because I was nervous. I stammered because I was a bit excited by the thought. However, the pressing matter of my transformation remained, which needed to be kept a secret.

"I see." She replied, understanding the matter at hand, and looked at her children, "Whatever you see now shall never be spoken on the outside. Am I clear? Or you would be answering to the elder."

Gulp!

Gulp!

Two audible gulps sounded in the room as Zara's sons trembled slightly at the mention of the said 'elder' while her daughter remained composed like a noble.

"Understood, mother." She answered her mother before she added, "I am certain I speak for all of us."

Hmm... From this conversation, it seemed like the lord was alone in this family. His children were already on their mother's side and were part of the organization that Zara was trying to recruit me into.

Well, whatever. From the looks of it, I could do their mother in front of them and they wouldn't mind a single bit. Just the thought was enough to excite me. I did consider asking her daughter to join, but I wanted my first threesome to be with the family. A bit longer than twenty minutes as well.

So, until I got my dick fixed which wasn't far from now, I would only be doing one on one sessions which allowed me to thoroughly enjoy only one woman rather than leave two or more unsatisfied at the same time. Of course, in this world, the said satisfaction would be mine, but the matter still remained.

"You may begin now," Zara said, but I had other plans in mind for today.

"How about you let me prepare you a bit, Lady Zara? Dry penetration can be painful for your vagina." I explained vaguely, but since she lost her virginity yesterday, she must have felt some discomfort down there.

"Hmm... You are correct." She said as she lifted her dress.

She parted her pink pussy that was very, very slightly red and said, "It felt irritating since yesterday so I applied some mana to soothe it but it still aches, but only just a bit. Nothing I can't endure."

Because she was gaining power from it, after all. Some irritation was a small price to pay for great power. Who cared about a little swollen pussy, right?

I didn't.

I knelt down behind her and applied [Cleanse] to her nether regions.

[Cleanse x2]

Her pussy's fragrance was reminiscent to Kiwi. The perfect balance of fresh sweetness and tanginess. I inhaled deeply to fill my nostrils with the aroma and extended my tongue to give it just the smallest of licks.

"Hmm?" That caught Zara's attention, and she turned to me, her body still in the same position, "What are you doing? It's filthy down there."

"Please do not concern yourself, Lady Zara. I have cleaned it with magic." I simply replied. Usually, a commoner using magic on a noble would have been a sin, and from how her son was about to react, it seemed like it was the same in this case, but...

"Is that so? You can continue then." Zara nonchalantly said and permitted me to continue.

That also served to calm her children down.

Slurp...

This time, I gave it a proper lick and then blew a bout of hot air from my lips on her slightly puffy pussy lips. I could have diminished her pussy's discomfort but where was the fun in that? Ravaging a pussy that served to provide pain and pleasure to its owner was a different kind of fun.

"Unn~~"

She immediately let out a moan. But there was a tremble of discomfort in her body that didn't manage to make it to her moan because pleasure beat it to it.

"Does it feel good, Lady Zara?" I asked.

"Yes. Quite more than I expected." Zara honestly replied without a hint of embarrassment.

"Then can you please say it out loud, how you feel?" I asked.

"Why?" Zara suspiciously asked.

"So that I can know what I'm doing is right." I simply replied. The excuse was to get an idea of whether I was correct in my approach or not. Since it sounded like I was worried about her, she didn't mind and simply said, "All right."

With that, the first words that came out of her mouth when I licked her again were, "It's ticklish~"

She said it in a hot, sensual tone, so it sounded more erotic than the actual words, but to think that would be her first view. I couldn't help but chuckle inwardly and began to lick her in earnest.

"Aah~"

"Uuu~"

"Hmmm~~~"

She only let out short, low moans every time I gave her a gentle lick. The goal wasn't to make her climax but to keep her from climaxing. To make her frustrated, to realize that the pleasure she was feeling wasn't just a normal thing, and I was required to make her feel it, no one else could do the same.

"Hmm~~ It's stran-ung-e~" Zara said with a grunt. I stopped for a second and asked, "What is strange, Lady Zara?"

"It feels as if... something is missing." Zara couldn't help but say, and now that she wasn't moaning, her words were clear and without and hitch. I smiled and dove back in. To be honest, I couldn't resist her kiwi taste much longer, so it was a bit hard to hold myself back.

Still, for the sake of enslaving her mind, I had to do it. You heard me correctly. My target was her mind, not her body. Her body, in this world, was simply without any eroticism. All I could use against her in that condition was her mind.

Make her accustomed to the pleasure that can only come from me. Even if she didn't know anything about it, the significance of it on her body, she would remember the taste in her mind. Like some sort of drug.

Hook a young mind with a couple of sniffs, and once they were fully hooked, hike up the price. They would have no choice but to rely on you, their dealer. My idea was the same. To make Zara rely on me, and from the sounds of it, it was working...

"Th-There it is~~"

"Tha-That strange fe-feeling~"

Her pussy was quivering while her soft ass was tensing underneath my hands. If her soft ass was like this, her body would obviously be more tensed which meant she was quite close to cumming.

But was my torture over? Had my plan succeeded?

No.

I stopped eating her out and asked, "Is it a good feeling or bad, Lady Zara?"

It was a legit question, and it made sense to reply to it calmly, but when she replied, even her children were a little taken aback.

"Don't stop! Keep going! Make me feel it!" She replied with frustration and a tinge of weakness in her voice.

She was falling. Very slowly, sure, but she was falling.

It wouldn't be long before she would fall completely.

"Then allow me to make you feel it in a much better way," I said as I stood up and activated my state of completion.

Instantly, gasps were heard inside the room, but I ignored them. They weren't going to say anything about it anyway.

Instead, I focused on the slightly red pussy before me and...

"Heung~~~!!!"
